name: krm-stream
description: A live, honest window onto Kubernetes resources, in the browser: consume a KRM resource stream, three-way merge local edits, build a merge patch.
//: typescript is the ONLY devDependency, and there are no dependencies at all. The engine must emit plain, dependency-free ESM: gitops-api has no bundler and is not getting one. Node 22 runs the .ts tests directly (type stripping), so the test suite needs nothing either.
